{# Find the current term by URL match and render inside that iteration: Crinja's `set` is loop-local and has no `namespace`/`update`. #} {% for key, data in site.authors %} {% if page.url == "/authors/" ~ key ~ "/" or page.url == "/ko/authors/" ~ key ~ "/" %} {% set author = site.data.authors[key] %} {{ "authors.back" | t }}
{% if author and author.image %} {% endif %}

{{ author.name | default(key) }} {% if author and author.team %}{{ "authors.team" | t }}{% endif %}

{{ author.bio }}

{% endif %} {% if author and author.links %}
{% for link in author.links %} {% include "partials/author-link-icon.html" %} {% if link.label %}{{ link.label }}{% elif link.handle %}@{{ link.handle }}{% else %}{{ link.kind | default(link.url) }}{% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}

{{ "authors.all_posts" | t }}

    {# data.pages aggregates EN and KO. Hwaro leaves `language` blank on aggregated entries, so filter by URL prefix instead. #} {% for post in data.pages %} {% set is_ko = (post.url | replace("/ko/", "")) != post.url %} {% set keep = (page_language == "ko" and is_ko) or (page_language != "ko" and not is_ko) %} {% if keep %}
  • {{ post.date }}

    {{ post.title }}
